'''Yang Metal Monkey''' is the 57th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 庚 Kanoe (yang metal, the gaia-aligned face of occultation), and its branch is 申 Saru, the [[Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, both stem and branch share the metal element, doubling its weight in this node.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Earth Goat]] (node 56) and [[Yin Metal Rooster]] (node 58).

== Folk reading ==
Yang Metal Monkey is the '''vigil night'''. In some ringworld faiths the sixty-day return of this combination is observed with an all-night wake, intended to prevent the body's internal spirits from rising to the gods and reporting one's misdeeds. Stem and branch are both metal, giving the night its ''cold-hearted'' name; reign-titles were historically changed to soften its severity.

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kanoe (庚)]] — yang metal
* '''Branch:''' [[Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] — yang metal
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' occultation

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Earth Goat]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Metal Rooster]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q798775}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
